landing.title: The internship platform for Tunisia

interns.title: For students
interns.subtitle: Real internships, real work, real proof.

points.heading: One profile, every application
points.body: Your CV, skills, and preferences live in one place. Apply in one tap.

points.heading: Work that counts
points.body: Each internship runs inside a workspace with clear scope and deliverables. Your record is verifiable, not a promise.

points.heading: Async-friendly
points.body: Remote-first internships are first-class. Hours that fit your schedule.

companies.title: For companies
companies.subtitle: Post once. Run the program inside inturn. No more WhatsApp threads.

points.heading: Set up in 15 minutes
points.body: Post a structured internship in minutes. Get pre-screened applications back inside the platform.

points.heading: Run the work inside the workspace
points.body: Tasks, deliverables, comments, check-ins. The whole program in one place.

steps.heading: Post
steps.body: Companies define scope, deliverables, and deadlines.

steps.heading: Match
steps.body: Students apply through their inturn profile. Companies shortlist and accept.

steps.heading: Run
steps.body: A workspace opens automatically. Real work happens. Performance is recorded.

steps.verified: Get verified (we email you when it's done)

internshipTemplates.pickerSubtitle: Pre-filled scaffolds for common Tunisian internship archetypes. Tweak after applying.

visualDesigner.title: Visual designer — Brand work
visualDesigner.description: Lead visual exploration for a brand or product. You'll own moodboards, type pairings, logo iterations, and final guidelines. Weekly crit with the design lead; deliverables shipped in Figma + exported PDFs.

uxResearcher.title: UX research intern
uxResearcher.description: Run discovery interviews (5-8 sessions), synthesize findings into an actionable narrative, present to stakeholders. Strong note-taking + comfort with ambiguity required. Tools: Notion, Figma, FigJam.

frontendEngineer.title: Junior frontend engineer
frontendEngineer.description: Ship UI for a React + TypeScript product. Pair with senior engineers, heavy code review culture, real PRs from week 1. Stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Git.

dataAnalyst.title: Data analyst intern
dataAnalyst.description: Analyze product + business metrics, build dashboards, present findings to leadership weekly. Tools: SQL, Looker, Python (numpy/pandas). Bonus: experience with dbt or Metabase.

marketingIntern.title: Marketing + brand intern
marketingIntern.description: Run Instagram + TikTok content for an active campaign. Plan + post + read the comments. Tools: Notion for planning, Canva for assets, native analytics.

bilingualEditor.title: Bilingual editor (FR/EN)
bilingualEditor.description: Edit founder interviews + long-form content in French and English. Heavy on clarity, voice consistency, tight deadlines. Tools: Notion, Google Docs.

motionDesigner.title: Motion design intern
motionDesigner.description: Produce short brand motion (logo idents, social loops, intro videos). Work under direction of the brand lead. Tools: After Effects, Lottie, Figma.

contentStrategist.title: Content strategist intern
contentStrategist.description: Build the editorial calendar, write briefs, coordinate writers. Light SEO + audience research. Tools: Notion, Google Search Console, CMS of choice.

profileCompleteness.title: Profile completeness
profileCompleteness.subtitle: Stronger profiles convert better. Finish the basics so companies have what they need.

footer.tagline: The internship platform for Tunisian universities and the companies hiring their students.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie consent
cookieBanner.body: We use essential cookies (session, language, theme) to make Inturn work. Optional cookies help us understand usage. You can change your choice any time in your account settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: The rules everyone agrees to by using Inturn.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Inturn is operated by We Make It Grow, a company registered in Tunis, Tunisia. By creating an account on inturn.tn you accept these Terms of Service together with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: Who can use Inturn
sections.body: Inturn is for: (a) students aged 18+ enrolled in a recognised institution, (b) companies or non-profits offering legitimate internships, and (c) administrators authorised by Inturn. Accounts found to be impersonating others, scraping data, or operating bots will be suspended.

sections.heading: Internship listings
sections.body: Companies are responsible for the accuracy and legality of every internship they publish. Inturn reviews listings before they go live, but does not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of any third-party listing. Interns are responsible for performing their own due diligence before applying.

sections.heading: Compensation and contracts
sections.body: Inturn facilitates introductions only. Any internship contract, payment, or compensation is a direct relationship between the intern, the host company, and (where applicable) the university. Inturn is not a party to that contract and is not liable for non-payment, scope changes, or termination by either side.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: Don't post harmful, illegal, harassing, fraudulent, or sexually explicit content. Don't try to compromise the platform, bypass rate limits, or send unsolicited bulk messages. Don't impersonate someone else, including Inturn staff. Don't ask interns to pay you for an internship.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: You keep the IP rights to content you upload (CVs, project descriptions, deliverables). You grant Inturn a worldwide, non-exclusive licence to display, store, and back up that content as needed to run the service. Inturn's branding, code, and design are © We Make It Grow.

sections.heading: Suspension and termination
sections.body: We can suspend or close any account that violates these Terms, with or without notice depending on severity. You can close your own account at any time from the account settings — your data is then deleted within 30 days, except where legal record-keeping obligations require us to retain specific items longer.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: Inturn is provided 'as is.' To the extent permitted by Tunisian law, our maximum liability for any claim arising from the use of the platform is limited to the fees you paid us in the 12 months before the claim arose (€0 for free accounts).

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Tunisia. Disputes will be resolved by the competent courts of Tunis unless a mandatory consumer-protection forum applies for your country of residence.

sections.heading: Changes to these Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms. Material changes are announced by email and on the platform at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of Inturn after that means you accept the updated Terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: What we collect, why, and what you can do about it.

sections.heading: Data controller
sections.body: The controller of your personal data is We Make It Grow (the operator of Inturn), Tunis, Tunisia. You can reach the data protection contact at privacy@inturn.tn.

sections.heading: What we collect
sections.body: Account data (email, name, role) from Clerk; profile data you enter (university, skills, CV, portfolio links); usage data (pages viewed, actions taken — used to keep the platform secure and to fix bugs); content you create (applications, comments, deliverables). We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18.

sections.heading: Why we use it
sections.body: To create your account and authenticate you (Clerk); to show your profile to companies you apply to; to send transactional emails (welcome, application updates, deadlines); to keep the platform secure (rate-limit + fraud detection); to fix bugs and improve the product. We do not sell personal data and we do not run targeted advertising.

sections.heading: Legal basis
sections.body: We process personal data under the legal basis of (a) contract — running the service you signed up for; (b) legitimate interest — keeping the platform secure and improving it; and (c) consent — for optional cookies and any marketing emails (you can withdraw at any time).

sections.heading: Sub-processors
sections.body: We share data with: Clerk (authentication), Neon (database hosting, EU region), Vercel (web hosting, EU region), Resend (transactional email), Anthropic (AI-assisted features — only the text you submit for that specific request). All sub-processors are bound by data-processing agreements.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Active accounts: as long as you're using the service. Closed accounts: deleted within 30 days, except (a) audit logs we are legally required to retain, and (b) end-of-internship records — these are signed artefacts; we keep them until you ask for deletion.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. Email privacy@inturn.tn from the address on file. We respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Tunisian Instance Nationale de Protection des Données Personnelles (INPDP) or your local supervisory authority.

sections.heading: International transfers
sections.body: Our hosting and sub-processors operate from the EU and Tunisia. Where data is transferred outside the EU, we rely on Standard Contractual Clauses and equivalent safeguards.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: We use TLS in transit, encrypted storage at rest, rate-limiting against abuse, and least-privilege access controls. No system is perfectly secure — please report vulnerabilities to security@inturn.tn.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: The cookies we set and what they do.

sections.heading: Essential cookies
sections.body: These are required for Inturn to work. We use: __clerk_* (authentication, set by Clerk); inturn-theme (your light/dark preference); inturn-cookie-consent (records your choice on this banner — so we don't keep asking). You cannot disable essential cookies and continue to use the service.

sections.heading: Optional cookies
sections.body: We currently do not set analytics or marketing cookies. If we do in the future (e.g. anonymous product analytics), they will only load after you explicitly accept the cookie banner. You can change your choice any time by clearing the inturn-cookie-consent value in your browser storage.

sections.heading: Third-party cookies
sections.body: Clerk (our authentication provider) sets its own cookies under its own privacy policy: https://clerk.com/privacy. When you embed a meeting link or watch a video, that third party may set its own cookies under its own policy.

report.title: Report this listing

report.bodyPlaceholder: What did you see? Include specifics if possible (links, screenshots if shared elsewhere).

report.errorGeneric: Could not submit. Please try again.
